first_run.rationale: The scores are identical (4/10), and the core reasoning remains consistent across both evaluations. Both versions correctly identify the candidate's strengths in software engineering and entrepreneurship but highlight the same key gaps: a lack of Director-level strategic experience and deep, recognized AI expertise. The minor differences in wording and phrasing are well within the range of normal run-to-run variation and do not alter the substance of the assessment. The change in university did not lead to a change in score or reasoning.
